headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Ventas, Raises Price Target to $93
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Ventas (NYSE:VTR) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $80 to $93.

raw.headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Ventas, Raises Price Target to $93
raw.summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Ventas (NYSE:VTR) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $80 to $93.

headline: Ventas Issues Investor Presentation for Upcoming Investor Conferences
summary: CHICAGO, March 02, 2026--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) ("Ventas" or the "Company") today announced that it has issued an investor presentation for upcoming investor conferences, which is available on the Company’s website at ir.ventasreit.com/events-and-presentations for a limited period following the conferences.
